rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0010
rows.name: Being able to gather this much genetic information[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0020
rows.name: is all thanks to Elma's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0030
rows.name: Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0040
rows.name: I will return to NLA now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0050
rows.name: Really?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0060
rows.name: Yes, while I was collecting the genetic information, I heard it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0070
rows.name: The voices of those who nurtured this land.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0080
rows.name: "To connect is to nurture."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: xs32310100_SEL0010
rows.name: Nod, saying you definitely heard it too.

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0090
rows.name:
I didn't hear anything myself,
but those are wonderful words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: xs32310100_SEL0020
rows.name: Express concern that he might have inhaled some toxic spores.

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0100
rows.name: That's not it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0110
rows.name: He has looked at and listened to this planet more than anyone else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0120
rows.name: It wouldn't be strange if he heard voices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0130
rows.name: "To connect is to nurture," huh[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0140
rows.name: It's true that even if this world is erased,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0145
rows.name: if they can be reborn in the next world[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0150
rows.name: I want to connect them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0160
rows.name: Yes, I will make sure they are connected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0170
rows.name: Whoa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0180
rows.name: What's with this guy?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0190
rows.name: I might have intruded into its territory while gathering the data earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0200
rows.name: Leave this to us. You hurry back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32310100_MSG0210
rows.name: Understood![ST:wait ]
